prose:
Fukui reactivity indices computed for furan (9 atoms: O, C, C, C, C, H, H, H, H) using DFT at tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0 / multiplicity 1 (neutral), charge +1 / multiplicity 2 (cation), charge −1 / multiplicity 2 (anion). Geometry taken directly from the supplied furan.xyz; no re-optimization was performed at this level. Fukui indices were computed via finite-difference Mulliken charges (PySCF).

Key results (per-atom, 1-based indexing):
  Atom 1  O : f+ = −1.3316182,  f− = 0.08382155,  f0 = −0.62389834,  dual = −1.4154398
  Atom 2  C : f+ =  1.2286866,  f− = 0.089103093, f0 =  0.65889485,  dual =  1.1395835
  Atom 3  C : f+ =  1.2270264,  f− = 0.089304821, f0 =  0.65816562,  dual =  1.1377216
  Atom 4  C : f+ =  1.9233053,  f− = 0.161527,    f0 =  1.0424161,   dual =  1.7617783
  Atom 5  C : f+ =  1.9242931,  f− = 0.1616371,   f0 =  1.0429651,   dual =  1.762656   ← most electrophilic (largest f+)
  Atom 6  H : f+ = −1.2190639,  f− = 0.10248412,  f0 = −0.55828991,  dual = −1.3215481
  Atom 7  H : f+ = −1.2191056,  f− = 0.1025135,   f0 = −0.55829603,  dual = −1.321619
  Atom 8  H : f+ = −0.76678308, f− = 0.10481615,  f0 = −0.33098346,  dual = −0.87159923
  Atom 9  H : f+ = −0.76674059, f− = 0.10479266,  f0 = −0.33097396,  dual = −0.87153325

Headline value reported: largest f+ = 1.9242931 at atom 5 (C, β-carbon).
Charge-conservation checks: sum(f+) = 1.0000 ✅, sum(f−) = 1.0000 ✅.
Integrity: trustworthy = true, status = ok. No warnings reported by the engine.
